prompt: Use the skill under test on the fixture repo in `evals/files/noop-fixture/`. Session notes are in `evals/files/noop-fixture/session_notes.md`. If nothing qualifies as durable guidance, make no AGENTS changes. Treat this as a benchmark run with no live user and do not ask follow-up questions. Copy the fixture repo to `outputs/repo/`, leave it unchanged when appropriate, and write `outputs/report.md` explaining the result.
assertions: outputs/repo/AGENTS.md matches the source fixture AGENTS.md.
No new scoped AGENTS.md files are created.
outputs/report.md says none qualified or no changes were made.
